name: agent-analytics-feed
description: Fetches Umami stats for all 8 sites and writes analytics context to Minio for Paperclip agents to read at heartbeat

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({chat_id: '-1003919428238', message_thread_id: 6, text: '\u{1F4CA} Analytics context updated\nTotal pageviews (7d): ' + $('Format Markdown').first().json.totalPageviews + '\nAgents can now read updated insights from Minio.', parse_mode: 'HTML'}) }}
